W(L,{H,K,Q,D;U,w,F;d;a},q,p)end return H end,{},function(L,q)local p=f(q)local H=function(H,K,Q,D)return W(L,{H;K,Q,D},q,p)end return H end,function(L,q)local p=f(q)local H=function(H,K,Q,D,U,w)return
